blended.narrative: Crabbe Mountain is looking at light snowfall over the next 48 hours, with 3.1 inches of moderate-density snow expected. Snow levels around 15 ft. The 14-day outlook shows 11 inches total.

daily_summary.narrative: Tomorrow: 3.0" of snow, highs of 34°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
Saturday: 4" of snow, highs of 29°F. Expect powder.
